hash.code_snippet: export const hashPassword = (password: string): Promise<string> => hash(password, SALT_ROUNDS);

compare.code_snippet: export const verifyPassword = (password: string, passwordHash: string): Promise<boolean> => compare(password, passwordHash);

contract_changes: Added evidence comment blocks above hash and compare postconditions
evidence_quality remains confirmed (violations genuine, FP rate 0%)

false_positive_check.note: 2 apparent FPs were genuine violations in a bcrypt-using monorepo (AprilNEA/AChat) where root package.json check missed nested workspace dependency. Effective FP rate: 0%.
